channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Senior devs quit big tech over this
item.description: Cut on-call burnout 80% with Redis cache locks and pool sizing — the hidden reasons senior developers leave big tech in 2026

item.title: Pool size cheatsheet 2026
item.description: Stop guessing connection pool sizes — lock contention, SSL overhead, and idle timeouts break systems before CPU does. Learn the 2026 rules that replace CPU × 2 formulas.

item.title: 30% pay bump: AI pipeline skills vs prompts
item.description: AI skills that pay 30% more in 2026 — prompt engineering vs MLOps/tooling benchmarked with 2026 salary data, latency figures, and cost savings.

item.title: Portfolio mistakes cost remote jobs
item.description: Portfolio mistakes cost remote jobs — one system, one README, one cost breakdown. 2026 guide to proofs, not promises.

item.title: Land fair remote pay from low-cost country
item.description: Another client quoted $2,100/month, but it took three back-and-forths to realize that number didn’t include employer taxes I’d have to pay.

item.title: 5 RAG pipeline mistakes production teams ignore
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline latency 75% and AWS costs 67% with pgvector + Redis caching — the connection leaks, cache stampedes, and model drift most tutorials skip. 2026 production guide with code and numbers.

item.title: Rewrite backend stacks for African latency
item.description: Cut API latency 89% and errors 87% for African users — the stack changes, config snippets, and mistakes I made building for unreliable networks in 2026.

item.title: AI salaries 2026: which skills move the needle
item.description: Cut API error rates 90% with structured-output prompt engineering or cut costs 35% with vector search optimization — the 2026 salary breakdown for AI skills that actually move the needle.

item.title: Build systems, not just code
item.description: Avoid polished code dumps: show systems, not snippets. Learn how to build a portfolio that proves you can handle 1,000 TPS, survive region outages, and cut AWS costs — all with $0 infrastructure spend.

item.title: 3 reasons senior devs flee big tech
item.description: Senior engineers quit big tech for $0 salary bumps. Learn the three non-money reasons and how to measure them in your team with free scripts and Grafana dashboards.

item.title: Stop trusting CPU cores for connection pools
item.description: Over 78% of PostgreSQL bottlenecks in 2025 were I/O waits — yet most teams still set database pool size to CPU cores. Here’s the real formula.

item.title: Win the remote salary you're worth
item.description: Command 30% higher remote salary from low-cost countries in 2026 — PPP adjustment, exchange-rate locks, and the bridge technique that worked for 24 deals

item.title: When RAG pipelines hit 500ms in prod
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline latency 87% by moving from Chroma to PostgreSQL + pgvector — concurrency, cache stampedes, and the ivfflat tuning mistake most teams miss. 95% of requests now under 500ms.

item.title: Prove you ship, not just code
item.description: Portfolio that lands remote jobs: show production evidence, not screenshots. Learn how Nairobi engineers reduced failed payments 94% and cut AWS bills 40% with real code and metrics.

item.title: Pay me $95k: salary negotiation for Tunisia, Colombia
item.description: Land USD 95k–105k contracts from US/EU clients — spreadsheet kit, Wise 5.27.0 FX math, and email templates that actually work

item.title: AI salary boosters: 2 models that pay off in 2026
item.description: 2026 salary data shows RAG engineers earn 28% more, but observability engineers close roles 50% faster — here’s the breakdown with concrete numbers, pinned tools, and code you can ship today.

item.title: Max pool size missteps cripple apps
item.description: Cut p99 latency 60% with PostgreSQL connection pooling — the default 5–10 pool size and 30-second timeouts lose in 2026. Real benchmarks, Python 3.11 and asyncpg 0.29 examples.

item.title: Weaviate missed the real RAG bottleneck
item.description: Cut RAG latency 65% and AWS bill 32% by fixing prompt bloat, connection leaks, and cache TTL. Real numbers from a 7 k QPS Weaviate 1.22 pipeline.

item.title: Senior exodus: meetings vs code
item.description: Senior engineers quit big tech not because of pay but because of scaling friction — connection leaks, unobserved errors, and flaky staging cost teams 40% of their velocity. Measure your own stack with pgBouncer 1.21, Prometheus 2.47, and Node.js 20 LTS.

item.title: Close the remote pay gap now
item.description: Increase remote salary 15–25% from a low-cost country in 2026 — Wise, Revolut, and the exact email template to anchor your ask and split FX risk.
